sections.paragraph:
Exo 30:23, and בֹּשֶׂם m.

(1) a sweet smell, especially such as spices emit, Syr. ܒܶܣܡܳܐ spice, Isa 3:24 קִנְּמָן־בֶּשֶׂם sweet smelling cinnamon, Ex. loc. cit.; pl. Son 4:16.

(2) spice itself, 1Ki 10:10 Exo 35:28 Eze 27:22 pl. בְּשָׂמִים spices, Exo 25:6 35:8 הָרֵי בְשָׂמִים mountains abounding in spices, Son 8:14.

(3) i.q. בָּשָׂם the balsam shrub, Son 5:13 6:2 .
